name: contextRef
definition_local: Default XBRL context reference. May be overridden at runtime.

name: Invoice
definition_local: Semantic parent group for ADS XBRL GL binding.

name: Seller
definition: A group of business terms providing information about the Seller.
definition_local: Semantic parent group for Supplier Listing binding.

name: Seller Name
definition: The full formal name of the Seller.

name: Seller Identifier
definition_local: Supplier account identifier from invoice Seller.

name: Seller Postal Address
definition: Information about the address of the Seller.
definition_local: Vendor address under the selected identifier reference.

name: Seller Address Line 1
definition: The main address line in an address.

name: Seller City
definition: The city where the Seller address is located.

name: Seller Post Code
definition: The postal code of the Seller address.

name: Seller Country Subdivision
definition: The subdivision of the Seller country.

name: Seller Country Code
definition: A code that identifies the Seller country.
